ui.label: Component registry and primitive styling
ui.launch_value: Gives DX-WWW a shadcn-style component registry view with source-owned button, table, badge, card, tabs, dialog, dropdown, and sidebar recipes.
ui.runtime_boundary: No React component runtime, Radix runtime, CVA runtime, or package-manager install is executed.

layout.label: Dashboard block layout
layout.launch_value: Keeps the dashboard shell, source table, navigation, and proof panels reusable in DX-WWW route files.
layout.runtime_boundary: Responsive layout is represented as source CSS and DX-WWW components, not a hydrated React dashboard.

interaction.label: Tabs, dialog, dropdown, slot/as-child behavior
interaction.launch_value: Documents the interaction affordances that matter for launch while keeping DX-WWW source-owned primitive recipes visible.
interaction.runtime_boundary: Focus trapping, keyboard menus, command filtering, and tab state machines remain launch shims.

docs.label: Registry docs and install guidance
docs.launch_value: Turns registry style/theme documentation into auditable proof tables and route status docs.
docs.runtime_boundary: Install snippets are provenance only and are not executed.

dashboard.label: Dashboard gallery proof
dashboard.launch_value: Shows the registry dashboard block inventory as a DX-WWW proof surface instead of fake gallery cards.
dashboard.runtime_boundary: Charts and data-table sorting are recorded structurally, not executed.

brand.label: shadcn-ui visual identity
brand.launch_value: Keeps the upstream source mark visible in the DX-WWW route header.
brand.runtime_boundary: Only copied, provenance-tracked static assets are used.
